​Advanced Zoom: Samsung’s 100x Space Zoom and dual-telephoto system generally outperform Apple's more limited optical range.
​Integrated S-Pen: Neither iPhone nor Vivo offers a built-in stylus for productivity and remote camera control.
​Display Tech: The S26 Ultra features the latest M15 OLED panel with superior anti-reflective coating and higher peak brightness.

Text: Samsung galaxy flip 5 camera is good, no doubt. The biggest issue is with it's fold. The screen will get damaged even if you try to be cautious and the service center will always claim that it's the customers fault and the customer might have dropped the phone. I purchased my Samsung galaxy flip 5 in Feb 24. Within 7 months, its screen fold rubber bidding came out even if my phone usage is quite moderate. Because of this some dust particles entered the hinge part and the screen started cracking. Samsung service center charges me Rs 27500/- claiming physical damaged. After replacing the screen, I purchased a rugged cover for the phone. And then screen started getting white line in center and then half of the screen went white followed by complete failure of screen within few months. Again the service center claimed it to be physical damage.  and the phone will overheat in no time causing shutting down apps if you are using other app during video call. During charging, it heats up like I am holding a hot plate. On top of that, resell value of the phone is so low, I would get 15100/- for the phone after getting the screen replaced of 27500/- 😭. Now the Samsung galaxy flip 5 is kept in my drawer and I had to revert back to iPhone. Very good experience of flexing the phone in front of others and also had the worst experience of using it😢. And if you are clumsy, then God save you 😂

And then screen started getting white line in center and then half of the screen went white followed by complete failure of screen within few months. Again the service center claimed it to be physical damage.  and the phone will overheat in no time causing shutting down apps if you are using other app during video call. During charging, it heats up like I am holding a hot plate. On top of that, resell value of the phone is so low, I would get 15100/- for the phone after getting the screen replaced of 27500/- 😭. Text:
1) it's toooooo heavy. Haath mein pakad ke wrist dukhne lagta hai.
This phone is big fat brick. It's like carrying a mini computer, very powerful but heavy also.
2) battery life is less (oneplus is more)
3) display has graininess (you can see pixels like texture sometimes, especially low light)
4) display has PWM which can bother sensitive people (oneplus has traditional dimming)
5) Samsung has region lock which is a big pain if you are using phones outside region. You will never get proper network connectivity in US
6) Samsung has knox security - awesome feature which nobody talks about.
Saare reviews benchmarks, camera, battery aur display tak hi seemit hain 😂
But nowadays even all mid range phones are fast enough. Even my 6 years old Oneplus 8t is fast enough.
Software is where the real developments are.

Other than that, i have no complaints.

I do a lot of rescue and tech work and this phone cannot set the default app to open specific file types (Samsung devices natively support the following document formats: doc, docx, xls, xlsx, ppt, pptx, pdf, and txt.). 
Trying to open map files (*.KML or *.KMZ) cannot allow a default app to be set, you can only open the file within the particular app. This is not frugal for those who need to save seconds to save others. I am SERIOUSLY disappointed in Samsung!

I have been repairing it in 2K since spring, it is going well till now but there is no guarantee what will happen in future. And this same problem is not only with me, it happens with 80% of Moto users, many people's mobile has to explode while charging. Motorola mobiles are not safe. Please choose another brand. 😢😢
